channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: YouTube’s Tuma Basa to Exit as Director of Black Music & Culture
item.description: 🎶 Sending love and good vibes to Tuma Basa as he moves on to new adventures! Thanks for all the incredible music moments! 💫 #TumaBasa #MusicNews

item.title: ‘Time’s Ticking,’ Indeed: Every Song That’s Taken More Than a Year to Reach No. 1 on Billboard’s Country Airplay Chart
item.description: 🎶 Slow and steady wins the race! Which country songs took their sweet time climbing the charts? 🤠 #CountryMusicHistory #PatiencePaysOff

item.title: Bo Lueders, Harm’s Way Guitarist and HardLore Podcast Host, Dies at 38
item.description: 🎸 Remembering the incredible Bo Lueders 🌟 His music will forever rock our hearts! #RIPBoLueders 💔

item.title: Scarlett Johansson Reveals First Concert Was Cypress Hill: “Still Buzzing”
item.description: Scarlett Johansson's first concert? 🤯 She rocked out to Cypress Hill and is still buzzing! 🎶 #musicmemories

item.title: Wolfgang Van Halen Rick Rolls Audience After Teasing a Van Halen Song: Watch
item.description: 🎸 Wolfgang Van Halen brings the ultimate surprise with a classic Van Halen hit! Rock on! 🤘🎶 #RickRolled #VanHalenRevived
